calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-07-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Debra Lew, Esq. for Plaintiff: State Bar of California, a Public Corporation.
No appearance by the Defendants: Stephen Chrystie.
10:00 a.m.- Plaintiff's witness: Tracey McCormick was sworn and direct examined.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for principal in sum of $50,000.00
Judgment signed in open court.
